## Source: ghsa-malware (12c8b34b21bce0d06ec123b7ca0d1cf5dec96c582977961de1ef788aca2dfd29)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (1c5711b3c10ba19ca7c68581b9cd246029ba621b35c0371e4a043d69050b9363)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'modified_bayes' @ 10.1.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
